chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.417 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of main case 2.For hg of CMA No.4223/22 14.04.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ali Zahed, advocate for appellant. M/s. Junaid Ahmed, Kawish Hussain and Shahmir Memon, advocates for respondents. After submitting arguments at some length, learned counsel for appellant, when failed to satisfy the Court in respect of the issue, has agreed to withdraw the appeal and seeks direction to the Tribunal to decide the suit of the appellant within a certain period. Learned counsel appearing for respondents has no objection. Accordingly, this appeal is dismissed as withdrawn; however, the Tribunal where the plaint has been returned in terms of Order 7 Rule 10 CPC through impugned order shall proceed with the matter expeditiously and decide it within a period of two months with intimation to this Court through MIT-II. The appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
